overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along rainy city streets at dusk. The player navigates wet sidewalks, passes a hotel entrance, and crosses a busy intersection with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a building with red metal railings

notable_agents.action: white car driving along the wet road

entered.detail: commercial building with red metal railings and beige stucco walls
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
multi-lane road with rain puddles and vehicle reflections
distinctive building with blue awnings and tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rainy city sidewalk at dusk. The camera moves steadily past a beige commercial building with red railings on the left, while palm trees line the path. To the right, a wet multi-lane road has sparse traffic, and a distinctive historic building with blue awnings is visible in the distance.

events.description: passing the covered driveway entrance of the building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the building entrance and approaching the street intersection

notable_agents.action: red car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: covered building entrance with columns and overhead lighting
tall modern building with illuminated windows visible behind the entrance
traffic light pole with illuminated signals

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a covered driveway entrance with columns on the left, revealing a tall high-rise building behind it. The historic building with blue awnings on the right grows larger as the camera approaches the intersection. Traffic increases with a red car and black SUV passing by on the wet road.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with red traffic light, vehicles moving through intersection
beginning to cross the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet street at the crosswalk, navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white compact car driving through the intersection
motorcycle with rider crossing the intersection

entered.detail: red newspaper stand on the sidewalk corner
white painted crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the intersection and begins crossing the street. A red newspaper vending machine stands at the corner near the crosswalk. Vehicles including a white compact car and a motorcycle navigate the wet intersection. The ornate historic building remains prominent on the right side as the camera moves through the crosswalk.

events.description: finishing crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk on the far side of the intersection, passing palm trees and street lights

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the road

entered.detail: green bushes and landscaping along the sidewalk
low-rise pink apartment building visible down the street
residential buildings lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk. Palm trees line the left side closer to the camera, while the ornate historic building recedes into the distance on the right. A red sports car drives past on the wet road, and residential buildings become visible further down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rainy city sidewalk at dusk that transitions from a quiet commercial stretch to a busy urban intersection. It begins by moving past a beige building with red railings and palm trees, while a historic building with blue awnings remains a distant landmark across the wet road. As the camera passes a columned driveway and a towering high-rise, the historic building grows larger and traffic increases with a red car and black SUV passing by. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the corner by a red newspaper vending machine and crosses the intersection amidst white cars and motorcycles. Finally, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, leaving the ornate building behind as a red sports car speeds past and residential structures appear in the distance.
